entries.title: CRM Public Record Conflict Checker
entries.notes: Scrapes LinkedIn, Crunchbase, and news for signal vs CRM field mismatches. One engineer can build the scraper layer in 4 weeks. Gap: no tool cross-validates sales data against public sources in real-time.
entries.pain: Sales reps waste hours chasing leads whose public data contradicts their CRM records.

entries.title: Job Posting Trend Heatmap
entries.notes: Scrapes Indeed/LinkedIn for tech keyword density over time per company. Lightweight extension with cloud aggregation backend. Gap: no browser-native tool surfaces job posting trend intelligence.
entries.pain: Recruiters and analysts manually track competitor job postings to infer product roadmap signals.

entries.title: GitHub Trending Topic Velocity Tracker
entries.notes: Tracks HN front-page repo mentions and GitHub star velocity patterns. Builds trending signal before saturation. Gap: no real-time trend velocity overlay exists.
entries.pain: Developers miss emerging library trends until after the community peak.

entries.title: Design System Token Consistency Auditor
entries.notes: Parses CSS custom properties against a declared token manifest. Flags deviations inline. Can ship as a devtools overlay in 3 weeks. Gap: no live CSS audit for token drift exists.
entries.pain: Frontend teams ship UIs where design tokens drift silently across components.

entries.title: Meeting Summary Action Item Carver
entries.notes: Extracts action items from pasted transcripts or Gong embeds using lightweight NER. Exports to CRM fields. Gap: no frictionless meeting-to-task handoff tool.
entries.pain: Sales and ops teams lose action items buried in meeting transcripts and notes.

entries.title: System Dependency Graph Mapper
entries.notes: Traces import/require statements and API calls to auto-generate a local dependency graph. Visualizes in a collapsible sidebar. Gap: no browser-devtools integration for live architecture discovery.
entries.pain: Engineers reverse-engineer system architecture by hand when docs fall out of sync.

entries.title: Network-Aware Image Optimizer
entries.notes: Detects connection type via Network Information API and downscales images above a size threshold on-page. No backend required. Gap: no client-side adaptive image loader.
entries.pain: Users on slow connections wait for heavy images that could be downsampled dynamically.

entries.title: Schema Drift Alert Overlay
entries.notes: Intercepts JSON responses and validates against a declared OpenAPI/JSON Schema. Alerts on drift with diff view. Gap: no in-browser schema validation guard.
entries.pain: Backend teams discover breaking schema changes in production instead of staging.

entries.title: Database Query Pattern Analyzer
entries.notes: Monitors network requests for ORM query signatures and suggests N+1 patterns and missing indexes. Uses request annotation. Gap: no lightweight ORM query profiler in the browser.
entries.pain: Developers debugging slow pages lack visibility into ORM-generated SQL patterns.

entries.title: Email Response Velocity Forecaster
entries.notes: Analyzes historical email thread reply patterns by recipient domain and time-of-day. Suggests optimal follow-up windows. Gap: no per-recipient email cadence intelligence in-browser.
entries.pain: Outbound reps follow up too early or too late because they lack thread velocity data.

entries.title: API Scaling Trajectory Forecaster
entries.notes: Tracks request volume trends per endpoint over rolling windows. Projects capacity needs with simple linear regression. Gap: no in-browser API traffic forecasting panel.
entries.pain: DevOps teams react to API traffic spikes instead of anticipating scaling needs.

entries.title: DevTool Config Debt Tracker
entries.notes: Scans .config files in repo against team baseline. Reports drift score and specific violations. Gap: no config drift detector tied to browser devtools.
entries.pain: Engineering teams accumulate configuration drift (ESLint, Prettier, TSConfig) that slows onboarding.

entries.title: Browser Session Context Switcher
entries.notes: Labels tab groups with project context, captures session state snapshots, and lets users restore full context windows. Gap: no tab-group-level session persistence layer.
entries.pain: Knowledge workers juggle context across projects and lose state when switching between task clusters.

entries.title: Architecture Auto-Documenter
entries.notes: Traces runtime call chains and generates Mermaid-style architecture diagrams from actual execution paths. Uses Chrome debugger API. Gap: no runtime-derived architecture doc generator.
entries.pain: Senior engineers spend days documenting architecture that can be inferred from live code.
